description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 9, 2026 at 3:13 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a class C motorhome in a parking lot at 1301 Evans Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was parked facing southwest at the parking lot entrance at 1301 Evans Avenue with its hazard lights activated for a 
passenger drop-off. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a class C motorhome traveling northeastbound in the parking lot approached the 
Waymo AV from the front and slowed to a stop. The Waymo AV proceeded forward and to the left, then reversed, then proceeded forward 
again before coming to a stop. While the Waymo AV was stopped, the motorhome proceeded forward, passing the Waymo AV on the left, 
and as the motorhome was passing the Waymo AV the rear left side of the motorhome made contact with the rear left side of the stationary 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage.
Print
Clear Form
